name: This is a refutation of the ideas of those who, in formulating their concepts of God, are
introduction:
inclined to consider God analogous to their own imperfect selves and hence ascribe to God
the weaknesses characteristic of human beings. An instance at hand is the famous Biblical
statement that God created the heavens and the earth in six days and on the seventh day He
rested (see Genesis, chapters 1 and 2).
